name: Herbert Stothart
abstract: Herbert Pope Stothart (September 11, 1885 – February 1, 1949) was an American songwriter, arranger, conductor, and composer. He was nominated for ten Academy Awards and won Best Original Score for The Wizard of Oz.

about_quotes.speaker: Skitch Henderson
about_quotes.evidence: my first boss at MGM was a man by the name of Herbert Stothart
about_quotes.doc_title: Skitch Henderson interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Milford, Connecticut, October 31, 1998
